notes: token preserves Devanagari from PDF text layer (including svara marks when present)

rules.distanceFromPrevWord: distance from nearest previous word token on same line; punctuation handled explicitly as gap+punctWidth+gap
rules.distanceToNextWord: distance to nearest next word token on same line; punctuation handled explicitly as gap+punctWidth+gap
rules.distance_placeholders: first pass uses placeholder for missing prev/next word, second pass fills with global averages from observed distances
rules.normalizedWidthInLine: token width divided by line median word width
